svg.text: Solo + AI · effort-based (no dates) · depth before breadth. A small, complete, stable, fun game beats a huge, broken one.
VERTICAL SLICE · prove the core is fun
fun? if not, stay on the loop
decisive go / no-go — fail = re-invest, freeze content
DECISION GATES (ADRs) — resolve by the milestone below
A deep design tempts endless expansion; a solo builder can be buried by their own ambition. These mechanisms hold the line.
If none → it waits or dies.
P3 node memory · P4 survival triangle
P5 social sim · P6 artifacts over XP
NEVER cut a Must or skip a gate.
New idea → Parking Lot, never a
Always a playable build — play it
Over a cap → cut or defer, not add
AI generates; the human gates. The
cap is what one person can review.
The gate is the point. Keep it small, complete, stable, and fun. · Reads with GDD.md · PRD.md · DESIGN.md · PRODUCTION.md
